chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.322 of 2019 Abdul Qadir Versus Mst. Shabeena Farooq & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 3324/23 2. For orders on CMA 3325/23 3. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 07.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant was earlier representing appellant however since appellant has expired he has filed application (CMA No.3324/2023) fixed at Sr. No.1 for bringing his legal heirs on record. In addition to earlier Vakalatnama for the appellant, which now expires, learned counsel has filed his Vakalatnama on behalf of these legal heirs as well along with FRC Certificate issued from NADRA which are taken on record. Learned counsel has requested for unconditional withdrawal of this appeal for which he has also moved separate application (CMA No.3325/2023) fixed at Sr. No.2. Both the applications are allowed and instant High Court Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications. Judge Judge
